title: SRS airbag system structure description - Passenger seat occupant switch
section: Driver assistance SRS airbags seat belts

blocks.text: SRS airbag system structure description - Passenger seat occupant switch

The front passenger seat occupant switch is located inside the front passenger seat cushion trim cover/pad. When weight is applied to the switch, the switch is turned ON and the signal is transmitted to the SRS unit to determine that a passenger is seated in the front passenger seat. If the front passenger seat occupant switch is ON and the front passenger seat belt is not installed, the seat belt warning light in the combination meter illuminates to remind the occupant to wear the seat belt.
